name: Astellas Pharma Inc.
lede: Astellas runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Mumbai, covering gcc/gic and sales & marketing.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Astellas office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Astellas Pharma Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Astellas runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Mumbai), covering gcc/gic and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Managing Director, India Center Head and VP of Engineering

about.description: Astellas's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Mumbai, spanning gcc/gic and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Astellas operate in India?
faq.a: Astellas operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Astellas have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Astellas's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Mumbai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Astellas run in India?
faq.a: Astellas runs gcc/gic and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Astellas's India GCCs?
faq.a: Astellas's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Astellas's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at Astellas's India centers, across HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
